{{Infobox location
| name = Fisher territory
| introduced = Soulsmith
}}

== Soulsmith ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|[[Lindon]] and Gesha return to [[Fisher territory]].<ref name="cradle-02-soulsmith-c12">''Soulsmith'', chapter 12</ref>}}

== Blackflame ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|[[Fisher territory]] contains a collection of wooden buildings.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c3">''Blackflame'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=cradle-03-blackflame|The [[Fisher territory]] contains a tall building with blue clouds and Arelius banners.<ref name="cradle-03-blackflame-c5">''Blackflame'', chapter 5</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:Soulsmith]]
[[Category:Blackflame]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle locations]]
[[Category:Regions]]
